codeReview.summary: Clean, well-structured implementation of category filter bar and search functionality. All 11 expected behaviors from the feature spec are covered: 6 category toggle buttons with NERV styling (clip-path corners, neon glow active/dimmed inactive), EVA-styled search bar with case-insensitive matching and dropdown scoped to active categories, empty states for all-filtered and no-results, auto-close of detail panel on category filter-out, and horizontal scroll on mobile. 22 new tests across 3 test files plus 2 new integration tests in MapView. Code follows project conventions (TypeScript strict, Tailwind nerv.* colors, pointer-events-none on overlays, clip-path instead of border-radius for panels). Inline styles used only for complex CSS values per AGENTS.md exception.

issues.description: handleSelectPlace useCallback depends on viewState.zoom, causing the callback to be recreated on every zoom change. Since zoom changes frequently during pinch/scroll, this triggers unnecessary re-renders of child components receiving this callback. Consider using a ref for viewState.zoom to stabilize the callback identity.

No keyboard navigation (arrow keys) within the search dropdown results. Users can Tab through results since they're buttons, but arrow-key navigation is a common UX pattern for typeahead dropdowns. Low priority given the small dataset (21 places max).
Inline fontSize: '10px' for category label in dropdown results. Could use Tailwind text-[10px] for consistency, though this is a very minor style preference.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker used pointer-events-none on the parent container div and pointer-events-auto on interactive children (CategoryFilterBar, SearchBar) to allow click-through to the map while keeping controls interactive. This is a good pattern for overlay UIs that isn't explicitly documented in AGENTS.md — only 'pointer-events: none on decorative overlays' is mentioned. The interactive overlay pattern could be documented for future workers building controls over the map.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: components/map/map-view.tsx:140 — parent div has 'pointer-events-none', while category-filter-bar.tsx:37 and search-bar.tsx:80 both have 'pointer-events-auto' on their root elements.

summary: Feature passes review. All 11 expected behaviors are implemented and tested. Category filter bar renders 6 NERV-styled toggle buttons with proper clip-path corners and neon glow states. Search bar provides EVA-styled typeahead with case-insensitive matching scoped to active categories. Empty states, auto-close on filter-out, and mobile horizontal scroll all present. 22 new tests with good coverage. Three non-blocking issues noted: useCallback dependency on viewState.zoom causing unnecessary recreations, missing arrow-key navigation in search dropdown, and one minor inline fontSize that could use Tailwind. No blocking issues found.
